license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.be9pjh5n
title: HuBMAP TMC-Florida/Zurich CODEX  Modality Overview
author: Marda Jorgensen

steps_raw.instruction: Process donor organs into samples for analysis. Lymph Node: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bbgnijve Thymus: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bbgmiju6 Spleen: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bc3kiykw
Register organ donor, organs received and common coordinate region information in the HuBMAP UUID generator at https://uuid.hubmapconsortium.org .
Prepare paraffin blocks from tissue samples. Cassette Processing: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.8nzhvf6 Paraffin Embedding: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bam9ic96
Prepare H&E sections for histopathological assessment. Sectioning: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bahdib26 H&E Staining: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.beamjac6
Validate antibodies in all target tissue types by IHC using DAB Staining: https://dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bdiei4be
Coat coverslips with Poly-L-Lysine. Coverslip Preparation: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.baxyifpw
Cut and mount sections for CODEX analysis. Sectioning: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.basdiea6
Stain coverslips with Akoya invertoried antibodies. Staining: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bbsdina6
Make CODEX bar coded reporter trays. Preparation: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bc2riyd6
Perform multiplex data acquisition using CODEX robot and Keyence microscope. Acquisition: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bdifi4bn
Transfer images to analysis computer and perform CODEX processing. Codex_Processor.docx
​Register completed CODEX section information in the HuBMAP UUID generator at https://uuid.hubmapconsortium.org .
Prepare and upload data to the HuBMAP HIVE Globus using hipergator. Datasets to HiperGator-Globus.docx
